content: CSS clamp() for fluid typography: clamp(min, preferred, max) where preferred uses rem+vw combo. Example: font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 2.5vw, 2.8rem). For 27" monitor at 3m, target large sizes: remaining score ~clamp(4rem, 8vw, 10rem), player name ~clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 4rem). Use rem for min/max (respects user zoom), vw for preferred (scales with screen). Cap with max to prevent overgrowth on ultrawide. Line-height 1.1-1.2 for dense score display.
